name: tunnel going out
description: I'm in a tunnel going out
hints: Another tunnel going outside with a sign and a gem.
GET GEM (treasure). READ SIGN for information. WEST enters a dome, GO DOME exits to the field.
GET GEM. GO DOME exits to field (room 7) and sets transformation flags. WEST goes to a dome (room 14) with another gem.
Collect the gem. WEST leads to a dome with a gem and a hidden base to search. GO DOME goes to the field.
notes: Tunnel with a sign and *Gem* treasure. GO DOME exits to field (room 7) with transformation flags. WEST goes to dome (room 14).
